\tzpentry{ID3871}{Coupled Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3871 introduces Coupled Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H} = \Module\left[\{\hat{T}_{\text{gyro}}, \hat{T}_{\text{field}}, \hat{U}_{\text{mag}}, \hat{U}_{\text{constraint}}, \hat{\mathcal{L}}_{\text{coupling}}\}\right] \end{equation}
